---
title: "Portfolio"
---
::: {.callout-warning}
# Page Under Construction
This page is currently under construction. Check back soon!
:::
```{=html}
<style>
  .bar-wrap { background: #e0e0e0; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; height: 18px; width: 100%; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; }
  .bar-fill { height: 100%; width: 0%; background: #378ADD; border-radius: 10px; transition: width 2.5s ease-in-out; }
  .status { font-size: 14px; color: #666; min-height: 22px; margin-top: 10px; transition: opacity 0.4s; }
  .pct { font-size: 13px; color: #999; margin-top: 4px; }
</style>
<div style="padding: 1.5rem 0 0.5rem; max-width: 500px;">
  <div class="bar-wrap"><div class="bar-fill" id="bar"></div></div>
  <p class="status" id="status-text">Data being cleaned...</p>
  <p class="pct" id="pct-text">68% complete</p>
</div>
<script>
const steps = [
  { msg: "Data being cleaned...",              pct: 68,   label: "68% complete" },
  { msg: "Training model...",                  pct: 74,   label: "74% complete" },
  { msg: "Awaiting sufficient sample size...", pct: 74,   label: "74% complete" },
  { msg: "p-value suspiciously low...",        pct: 4.9,  label: "p = 0.049" },
  { msg: "Overfitting in progress...",         pct: 99,   label: "Training accuracy: 99%??" },
  { msg: "Loading the tidyverse...",           pct: 47,   label: "Loaded 47 packages, 312 conflicts" }
];
let i = 0;
const barEl = document.getElementById('bar');
const statusEl = document.getElementById('status-text');
const pctEl = document.getElementById('pct-text');

function runStep() {
  const step = steps[i];

  // Fade out text
  statusEl.style.opacity = 0;
  pctEl.style.opacity = 0;

  // Reset bar to 0 instantly (no transition), then animate to target
  barEl.style.transition = 'none';
  barEl.style.width = '0%';

  setTimeout(() => {
    barEl.style.transition = 'width 2.5s ease-in-out';
    barEl.style.width = step.pct + '%';
    statusEl.textContent = step.msg;
    pctEl.textContent = step.label;
    statusEl.style.opacity = 1;
    pctEl.style.opacity = 1;
    i = (i + 1) % steps.length;
  }, 100);
}

runStep();
setInterval(runStep, 4000);
</script>
```
![](images/under_construction1.png)
